description: 10-QA synthetic conversation for harness smoke testing without MLX dependency

session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: I just adopted a golden retriever named Rusty.

session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: He's three years old. I got him from the shelter on Fremont Street.

session_1.speaker: Bob
session_1.text: I volunteered there last summer. Great place.

session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: I'm taking him to obedience classes starting next Monday.

session_2.speaker: Bob
session_2.text: How did the obedience classes go?

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: Really well! Rusty is a fast learner. The trainer is Marcus from Berkeley.

session_2.speaker: Bob
session_2.text: By the way, I'm moving to Seattle in March for a job at a fintech startup.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: Congrats! Is that the company that makes the budgeting app?

session_2.speaker: Bob
session_2.text: Yes, LedgerPal. They offered me the senior backend role.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: I've been using LedgerPal for two years. Small world!

session_3.speaker: Alice
session_3.text: Rusty had his first agility competition yesterday. He placed 4th.

session_3.speaker: Alice
session_3.text: 22 dogs. I'm really proud of him.

session_3.speaker: Bob
session_3.text: I closed on my Seattle apartment last week. Moving the 5th of March.

qa.question: What is the name of Alice's dog?
Where did Alice adopt Rusty from?
What company is Bob moving to Seattle for?
What role did LedgerPal offer Bob?
When is Bob moving to Seattle?
What place did Rusty get in his first agility competition?
How many dogs competed in Rusty's agility competition?
